issue.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `clipToOutline` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `clipToOutline` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Your app is currently not handling Selected Photos Access introduced in Android 14+
Your app is currently not handling Selected Photos Access introduced in Android 14+
Use `SwitchCompat` from AppCompat or `MaterialSwitch` from Material library
Use `SwitchCompat` from AppCompat or `MaterialSwitch` from Material library
Use `SwitchCompat` from AppCompat or `MaterialSwitch` from Material library
Use `SwitchCompat` from AppCompat or `MaterialSwitch` from Material library
Use `SwitchCompat` from AppCompat or `MaterialSwitch` from Material library
Use `SwitchCompat` from AppCompat or `MaterialSwitch` from Material library
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.15.0 is available: 1.17.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-core than 1.4.2 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-camera2 than 1.4.2 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-lifecycle than 1.4.2 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-video than 1.4.2 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-view than 1.4.2 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.8.7 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-transformer than 1.4.1 is available: 1.9.2
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-effect than 1.4.1 is available: 1.9.2
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-common than 1.4.1 is available: 1.9.2
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices

This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.camera.camera2.interop.ExperimentalCamera2Interop` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.camera.camera2.interop.ExperimentalCamera2Interop.class)`

Should not restrict activity to fixed orientation. This may not be suitable for different form factors, causing the app to be letterboxed.
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 21
Very long vector path (902 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `#000000` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.CameraX`)
The resource `R.string.app_name` appears to be unused
Should explicitly set `android:icon`, there is no default
Custom view `ZoomGridSliderView` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
